title: Waiting for a Girl Like You
why_this_song: Waiting for a Girl Like You by Foreigner (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "I've been waiting too long"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "So long, I've been looking too hard"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I've been waiting for a girl like you"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "When you love someone"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "To come into my life"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I've been waiting for a girl like you
I've been waiting for someone new
It feels so right, so warm and true
I need to know if you feel it too

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "waiting" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "waiting" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: So long, I've been looking too hard
I've been waiting for a girl like you

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Only in dreams could it be this way
I've been waiting for someone new

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Waiting for a Girl Like You" was released in 1981. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Waiting for a Girl Like You" foi lançada em 1981. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
